title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Pidilite Industries - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Pidilite Industries - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Pidilite Industries are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Pidilite Industries:
Pidilite Industries is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
